name: e-clat
description: E-CLAT — Workforce readiness and qualification management for regulated industries

scripts.build: npm run build -w @e-clat/shared && npm run build -w @e-clat/api && npm run build -w @e-clat/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @e-clat/shared && npm run typecheck -w @e-clat/api && npm run typecheck -w @e-clat/web
